chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Cr. Misc. Application No.S-308 of 2019 Date Order with signature of Judge 1. For orders on MA No.2232/2019 2. For hearing of main case 24-05-2019.-.-.-. -.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- None present for the applicant. Same was the position on the last date of hearing. Applicant after filing this Criminal Miscellaneous Application has lost interest, therefore, the same is dismissed for non-prosecution along with listed application. JUDGE Suleman Khan/PA
